network_summary: Crystal Barron is the Revenue Cycle Manager (billing/admin contact) for Pure Dental Spa, a Chicago-based multi-location dental brand founded and owned by Dr. Rajul Patel DDS. All three NPPES org-NPI records in this AO cluster are professional-corporation billing shells for Pure Dental Spa locations: 924 N Damen Ave (Ukrainian Village), 1755 W North Ave (Wicker Park), and 558 W Webster Ave (Lincoln Park area — mailing to Pure Dental Spa West Loop HQ at 1222 W Madison St). The brand operates 5 Chicagoland locations (Wicker Park, West Loop, Lincoln Park, Ukrainian Village, Bloomingdale). No PE or MSO backing found; Dr. Patel appears to be the independent founder-owner. The AO signal is an admin/billing-contact cluster, not an owner identity signal.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Crystal Barron is a Revenue Cycle Manager — a billing/admin contact, NOT an owner or dentist. The AO cluster is purely administrative; it points to shared revenue-cycle/billing operations across Pure Dental Spa corporate billing shells, not a hidden ownership network. The 558 W Webster address (CHICAGO DENTAL SPECIALISTS PC) may be a former or satellite Pure Dental Spa Lincoln Park location; its mailing address routes to Pure Dental Spa West Loop HQ. Pure Dental Spa's current public Lincoln Park listing is 1007 W Wellington Ave (not Webster), so 558 W Webster may be a closed/relocated shell — treat as potentially stale.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Crystal Barron listed as authorized official (title REVENUE CYCLE MANAGER) on three org-NPI billing shells. Documentary corroboration: (1) NPI 1073495990 Data Axle enrichment carries website=Puredentalspa.Com; (2) NPI 1225997240 mailing address resolves to Pure Dental Spa West Loop at 1222 W Madison St Ste 300; (3) puredentalspa.com public locator lists 924 N Damen and 1755 W North Ave as active Pure Dental Spa locations, matching the two Rajul Patel PC NPIs exactly; (4) Dr. Rajul Patel's online profiles (Tebra, Vitals, WebMD, LinkedIn) confirm she is the founder of Pure Dental Spa with 5 Chicago-area locations. No PE or MSO backing found.
future_app_notes: Pure Dental Spa (Dr. Rajul Patel) should be flagged as a branded multi-location practice (5 locations). All three location IDs in this cluster (372f422d96b53499, e7e7d347f2fa4da1, d3d0d75b2485f83e) should be promoted to dso_regional or dso_national to reflect Pure Dental Spa brand ownership. The 558 W Webster address warrants a stale/closed check — Pure Dental Spa's current Lincoln Park listing is 1007 W Wellington, not Webster. Crystal Barron's admin-contact status should be noted so future AO-cluster sweeps do not misidentify her as an owner. The 1007 W Wellington Ave Lincoln Park location (if it has a separate NPI) should also be checked for Pure Dental Spa brand promotion.
